items.name: memory-inspector-mcp
items.description: Injected x64 Windows DLL + MCP bridge exposing a Cheat-Engine-style live memory debugger as Claude / LLM tools: typed   hex view, first/next value scans, AOB, pointer/string scans, reverse pointer paths, ReClass-style struct dissect, CE-compatible structure sessions with XML round-trip,  patch/NOP, Zydis disassembler, watchers, snapshots.
